items.briefing:
Australia's Five Eyes intelligence partners have issued a warning that AI tools are helping cybercriminals launch faster and more sophisticated attacks — a timely reminder for all staff to stay alert to phishing emails and suspicious messages, which are becoming harder to detect. Separately, the Australian Computer Society has appointed Dr Prins Ralston as its new CEO, signalling continued focus on technology leadership in Australia.

With AI making scam communications more convincing than ever, take a moment to verify any unexpected requests — especially those asking for payments, credentials, or personal information — by contacting the sender directly through a known, trusted channel.

featured.title: Five Eyes cyber agencies warn AI is accelerating cyber risk
featured.quote: Five Eyes agencies warn AI is accelerating cyber threats, requiring urgent organisational response.
